title: Event settings
description: Control how your community creates, publishes, registers for and delivers Events. Platform rollout controls are shown separately so unavailable features cannot be enabled accidentally.
load_failed: Event settings could not be loaded.
save_failed: Event settings could not be saved. Your unsaved changes have been preserved.
restore_failed: Event defaults could not be restored.
readiness_desc: These operational capabilities are controlled by the platform and are read-only here.
ownership_desc: The upgrade separates community policy, per-Event setup and personal preferences so one switch cannot silently override another owner.
ownership_tenant_desc: Creation, moderation, registration availability, waitlists, recurrence, integrations, safety rollout and notification delivery.
ownership_event_desc: Registration forms, approval rules, guest limits, invitations, tickets, agenda sessions, reminders, staff, broadcasts and check-in devices.
ownership_member_desc: Reminder cadence and notification channels remain controlled by each recipient and are never overridden here.
impact_desc: Review the live records that may be affected before disabling a policy. Exit and revocation actions remain available.
impact_confirm_title: Apply settings that affect live Event records?
impact_confirm_body: The operational footprint above contains active records for a policy you are disabling. Existing exit and revocation actions remain available; review the counts and confirm this change.
general_desc: Choose who can create Events and the default publication policy.
moderation_required_desc: New Events must be approved before publication.
registration_desc: Set community defaults for registration and capacity workflows.
registration_enabled_desc: Organizers can collect confirmed registrations rather than interest only.
require_registration_desc: Events default to a confirmed registration workflow.
guest_registration_enabled_desc: Organizers can register guests who do not have member accounts.
waitlist_enabled_desc: Full Events can maintain an ordered waitlist.
timed_waitlist_offers_enabled_desc: Offer released places for a limited time. This requires platform readiness.
delivery_desc: Control advanced organizer workflows and external projections.
recurrence_enabled_desc: Organizers can create new recurring Events. Existing series remain manageable when this is disabled.
reminders_enabled_desc: Organizers can configure versioned reminder schedules. Disabling this cancels pending reminders after confirmation.
organizer_broadcasts_enabled_desc: Authorized Event staff can create or revise attendee messages. Already scheduled deliveries continue unless cancelled first.
offline_checkin_enabled_desc: Authorized staff can use signed offline attendance manifests.
calendar_feeds_enabled_desc: Members and tenants can use privacy-safe calendar subscriptions.
federation_sharing_enabled_desc: Eligible Events may be shared with connected communities.
advanced_desc: Use tenant overrides only when your community has reviewed the operational impact.
change_control_desc: Every change is version-checked and recorded in the tenant audit log.
reason_placeholder: Describe why these Event policies are changing and who approved the change.
restore_section_confirm_body: Only the tenant overrides in this section will be removed. Other Event settings will remain unchanged and the reason will be recorded.
restore_confirm_body: This replaces every tenant Event policy on this page with its default value. The reason you entered will be recorded in the audit log.
audit_desc: The 50 most recent Event policy changes for this community.
audit_empty: No Event configuration changes have been recorded yet.
